component.name: Table
component.description: A data table built from native <table> semantics. Composed from TableHead / TableBody / TableRow with TableHeaderCell (the filled column header) and TableCell. Cells come in three appearances: 'text' (a label with optional leading media and a monospaced subheading), 'tag' (a status Tag), and 'action' (trailing icon controls, right-aligned). Sharp corners; 40px row height; neutral-weak header fill with 1px row separators.
component.note: Compositional native-table API (not data-driven), so callers keep full control over columns, spans, and accessibility. Built from the Figma 'Table' page parts: <Header> (TableHeaderCell) and <Cell> (TableCell, appearance text|tag|action). Consumes semantic tokens only (--bg-neutral-weak, --border-neutral-default, --text-neutral-default).

root.rowHover: off by default; isRowHoverable tints body rows with --bg-neutral-weak

cell.subheading: optional second line in IBM Plex Mono 12/16 (--font-code), same color
cell.media: optional leading node (e.g. thumbnail), 12px gap before the label

useCases: List records with sortable / scannable columns (articles, authors, pages, staffers)
Show a status column as a colored Tag alongside text columns
Give each row trailing edit / delete icon controls
Pair a primary label with a secondary mono subheading (slug, id, path)

commonPatterns.name: Basic table
commonPatterns.description: Header row of TableHeaderCell, then body rows of TableCell.

commonPatterns.name: Status tag column
commonPatterns.description: Render a Tag inside a tag-appearance cell.

commonPatterns.name: Trailing actions
commonPatterns.description: Right-aligned icon controls in an action-appearance cell.

commonPatterns.name: Label with subheading
commonPatterns.description: Primary label plus a monospaced secondary line.

commonPatterns.name: Hoverable rows
commonPatterns.description: Tint rows on hover when they are clickable / selectable.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using a table purely for visual layout of non-tabular content
antiPatterns.reason: Tables imply a row/column data relationship to assistive tech.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use CSS grid/flex layout for page structure; reserve Table for tabular data.

antiPatterns.scenario: Putting a single key/value pair in a table
antiPatterns.reason: The header/row overhead adds no value for one datum.
antiPatterns.alternative: Render the value inline or in a definition list.

antiPatterns.scenario: Cramming multiple unrelated controls into one action cell
antiPatterns.reason: Crowded trailing icons are hard to target and read.
antiPatterns.alternative: Keep to 1–2 primary actions; move the rest into a DropdownMenu (more-horizontal).

slots.children: TableHead and TableBody (each containing TableRow → TableHeaderCell / TableCell)
slots.media: Optional leading node in a text cell
slots.subheading: Optional mono second line in a text cell

interactions.rowHover: When isRowHoverable, body rows tint to --bg-neutral-weak on hover
interactions.actions: Action cells host interactive IconButtons with their own hover/focus states

behavior.controlled: Stateless. Sorting, selection, and pagination are owned by the consumer.

accessibility.role: Native table semantics: table → rowgroup (thead/tbody) → row → columnheader / cell
accessibility.columnHeaders: TableHeaderCell renders <th scope="col"> so each column is announced
accessibility.actionLabels: Action IconButtons require an aria-label (no visible text)
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Native: interactive controls inside cells are in the tab order
accessibility.contrastNote: neutral.600 text on white and on the neutral.50 header fill meets AA at these sizes.

athenaConstraints.rowHeight: 40px min-height for header and body cells
athenaConstraints.semanticTokensOnly: Header fill, border, and text use semantic tokens (--bg-neutral-weak, --border-neutral-default, --text-neutral-default), never raw primitives

figmaDivergences.detail: The Figma Cell has no hover state; isRowHoverable is a code-only affordance for interactive rows, off by default.

aiHints.context: Reach for Table to present tabular data with column headers and rows. Compose TableHead + TableBody from TableRow, using TableHeaderCell for the header and TableCell for data. Use appearance='tag' for a status column, appearance='action' for trailing edit/delete IconButtons, and a subheading for a secondary mono line. Set isRowHoverable for clickable rows.
neverUseWhen: Laying out non-tabular page content — use grid/flex
Showing a single key/value — render inline
Presenting a list of navigation destinations — use SideNavigation
Offering a menu of actions detached from rows — use Menu or DropdownMenu
